launchdarkly.label: LaunchDarkly focus
launchdarkly.plan_line: LaunchDarkly for feature-flag state, rollout timing, audit history, and experiments — rollout causation.
launchdarkly.base_notes: Read feature-flag configs and status across environments, the change audit log (who toggled what and when — key for 'did a flag rollout cause the metric move'), experiment definitions and iterations, and environments via the official LaunchDarkly MCP server. Read-only is enforced by a Reader-role API token plus `--scope read` (writes are rejected at the API; see SETUP.md). WARNING: the server exposes flag-mutation tools (toggle-flag, create/delete-flag, update-targeting, start/stop-experiment) — never call them; the Reader token blocks them.
